aboutCards.title: Design + Code

aboutCards.title: Performance Obsessed
aboutCards.description: From launch-time optimization to fluid animations, I focus on measurable quality and polished user interactions.

portfolios.headline: Crafting the software you need in minutes
portfolios.heroText: I'm 15 years old as of 2026, born on 7th Nov' 2010, I build real world applications in minutes, all those applications just the way you want.
portfolios.shippingDescription: Portfolio generator you may have never seen, it's free, and builds just what you want, simple and easy to do. You can easily change the look and feel of your portfolio for a staggering affordable price of roughly $3 a month!

aboutCards.title: AI + Vibe Coding
aboutCards.description: I used to write codes my self and some of my projects would take months, but with the help of Vibe Coding, I can achieve anything in minutes.
